user.title: Connect to your ADS-B feeder
user.description: Enter the host and port of your ADS-B feeder (tar1090-based, e.g. Ultrafeeder, readsb, dump1090-fa). SkyFeeder will poll the tar1090 JSON API for live aircraft data and (optionally) add map + stats panels to the sidebar.

data.name: Name
data.airport_code: Local airport code (ICAO or IATA, e.g. KPIR or PIR)
data.filter_types: Include only these ICAO type designators (comma-separated)
data.enable_device_trackers: Also auto-create trackers for every aircraft in area
data.enable_panels: Add ADS-B Map and Station Stats panels to the sidebar

data_description.host: Hostname, IP address, or mDNS name of the machine running your ADS-B feeder.
data_description.radius: Aircraft within this distance (in km) from the monitoring point will be included in area sensors and fire zone events.
data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) to poll the feeder. Minimum 5 s.
data_description.min_altitude: Ignore aircraft below this barometric altitude.
data_description.max_altitude: Ignore aircraft above this barometric altitude.
data_description.filter_categories: Comma-separated ICAO emitter categories to include - e.g. 'A1,A3,A5,A7'. A1=light, A3=large, A5=heavy, A7=rotorcraft, B1=glider, B6=UAV. Empty = all.
data_description.filter_types: Comma-separated ICAO type designators to include - e.g. 'A320,B738,R44'. Empty = all.
data_description.exclude_categories: Comma-separated ICAO emitter categories to exclude. Empty = none.
data_description.exclude_types: Comma-separated ICAO type designators to exclude (e.g. 'B6' to drop UAVs). Empty = none.
data_description.watched_registrations: Comma-separated list of aircraft registrations (tail numbers) to create a permanent device_tracker for, e.g. 'N12345, N6789'. Match is registration-only. The entity shows position while the airframe is inside the watch radius and goes 'not_home' otherwise.
data_description.enable_device_trackers: Opt-in. When on, SkyFeeder also creates one device_tracker per aircraft inside the watch area. Default is off because these entities accumulate over time.
data_description.max_device_trackers: When auto-tracking is on, limits how many trackers it creates (0 = unlimited). Closest aircraft are prioritised.
data_description.enable_panels: Adds two iframe panels to the HA sidebar pointing at the upstream tar1090 and graphs1090 UIs. If HA is HTTPS and the feeder is HTTP, browsers will block these as mixed content.
data_description.graphs1090_port: Port hosting graphs1090 (usually the same as tar1090).
data_description.airport_code: Optional. When set, takeoff and landing events are fired in AGL terms relative to this airport's runway elevation (sourced from OurAirports). Aircraft must be within 5 km of the field to qualify.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the feeder at the given host/port. Verify the host is reachable and that tar1090 is running.
error.airport_not_found: Airport code not found in the OurAirports dataset. Use the ICAO ident (e.g. KPIR) or IATA code (e.g. PIR).
error.airport_no_elevation: OurAirports has no elevation on file for that airport - takeoff/landing detection requires a known field elevation.

data.name: Name
data.filter_types: Include only these ICAO type designators
data.enable_device_trackers: Also auto-create trackers for every aircraft in area
data.enable_panels: Add ADS-B Map and Station Stats panels to the sidebar

error.airport_not_found: Airport code not found in the OurAirports dataset.
error.airport_no_elevation: OurAirports has no elevation on file for that airport.

track_aircraft.name: Track aircraft
track_aircraft.description: Add an aircraft to the manually-tracked list.

untrack_aircraft.name: Untrack aircraft
untrack_aircraft.description: Remove an aircraft from the manually-tracked list.

aircraft.name: Aircraft identifier
aircraft.description: The identifier used when tracking was added.

clear_tracked.name: Clear tracked aircraft
clear_tracked.description: Remove all aircraft from the manually-tracked list.
